title: Two Sum
description: Given an array of integers nums and an integer target, return indices of the two numbers such that they add up to target.
full_description: You may assume that each input would have exactly one solution.
You may not use the same element twice.
You can return the answer in any order.

title: Valid Parentheses
description: Given a string s containing just the characters '(', ')', '{', '}', '[' and ']', determine if the input string is valid.
full_description: An input string is valid if:
Open brackets must be closed by the same type of brackets.
Open brackets must be closed in the correct order.

title: Best Time to Buy and Sell Stock
description: You are given an array prices where prices[i] is the price of a given stock on the ith day.
full_description: You want to maximize your profit by choosing a single day to buy and a different day to sell.
Return the maximum profit you can achieve.

title: Contains Duplicate
description: Given an integer array nums, return true if any value appears at least twice.
full_description: Return true if any value appears at least twice in the array.
Return false if every element is distinct.

title: Maximum Subarray
description: Given an integer array nums, find the subarray with the largest sum.
full_description: A subarray is a contiguous part of an array.
Return the sum of the subarray with the largest sum.

title: Merge Intervals
description: Given an array of intervals, merge all overlapping intervals.
full_description: Intervals are given as pairs [start, end].
Merge all overlapping intervals and return the result.
